title: New ProductMetaDatabase
domain: D01 - one-time repository governance and product naming
pursuing_goal: Create ProductMetaDatabase for product schema, manifest templates, governance rules, and taskpack inputs without carrying 500GB raw materials.
phase_scope: Create a small static metadata skeleton.
Keep the skeleton parseable with standard-library validation.
Do not introduce runtime database coupling, backend routes, frontend routes, external APIs, raw data, or secrets.
